name: Fancy Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the green beans until they are tender-crisp, about 6-8 minutes.
2. In a salad bowl, mix together the olive oil, parmesan cheese, balsamic vinegar, salt, and black pepper. Whisk until the ingredients are well combined.
3. Toss the drained green beans with the dressing mixture.
4. Sprinkle the toasted slivered almonds over the green beans before serving.
